element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns Q*bert hops diagonally on pyramid cubes to change their color; single hop per cube advances level
Starts as bouncing egg at pyramid bottom, transforms into chasing snake; primary threat and arch-nemesis; fatal on contact
Purple creatures that traverse pyramid sides in Escheresque pattern; deadly on contact; approach from bottom corners toward top
Green creatures that descend and revert cube colors to original state; non-lethal but mechanically obstructive; removed on contact
Red balls appear at row 2, bounce downward, lethal on contact; green balls freeze all enemies temporarily
Each cube must be hit twice to reach target color; increases complexity and required precision
Cubes cycle through colors on each landing instead of holding target color; forces careful sequencing
Escape mechanism on pyramid sides; transports Q*bert to pyramid top; lures Coily to his death for 500 bonus points

typical_relief_triggers: Landing on floating disc (resets position to top, removes Coily temporarily)
typical_tension_triggers: Coily transformation from egg to active snake
Ugg/Wrongway enemy approach from pyramid corners
Incomplete cube coloring with multiple enemies present
Double-tap or cycling color cube requirements
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Cyclical tension escalation with enemy introduction progression; early stages safe with single-threat focus; mid-stages introduce multiple simultaneous threats requiring constant evasion and puzzle-solving; relief moments occur through disc escapes and power-ups; difficulty amplified through mechanical complexity rather than speed

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Floating discs on pyramid sides serve as optional escape/reward path rather than mandatory progression

difficulty_curve.early_game: Single threat (Coily) introduced; basic cube-changing mechanic; one hop per cube sufficient; player learns core diagonal hop navigation
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Multiple enemy types introduced sequentially (Ugg, Wrongway, Slick, Sam); bouncing balls added; floating disc escape mechanic introduced; cube interaction becomes more complex
difficulty_curve.late_game: Double-tap cube requirement combined with cycling color mechanic; all enemy types present simultaneously; requires precise sequencing and constant threat awareness
notable_spikes: Coily transformation from stationary egg to active pursuing snake
Introduction of Ugg/Wrongway with side-of-pyramid pathing
Combination of double-hit AND cycling color mechanics in same stage

notable_level_patterns.description: Early stages introduce Coily as lone antagonist, allowing player to master evasion without mechanical puzzle complexity interference
Each new stage type introduces distinct enemy with unique behavioral pattern (bouncing egg > snake chase > side-traversal > color-reversion)
Cube interaction rules become progressively more complex: single-tap → double-tap → cycling colors → combinations thereof
Optional floating discs on pyramid perimeter provide escape hatch; triggering Coily's death simultaneously removes all threats temporarily
